glosses.es: proyectil de artillería; granada de artillería
glosses.pt: projétil de artilharia; granada de artilharia

sentences.target: On a trouvé un obus sur la plage.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ a tʁuve œ̃ ɔby syʁ la plaʒ/

translations.fr: On a trouvé un obus sur la plage.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ a tʁuve œ̃ ɔby syʁ la plaʒ/
translations.en: We found an artillery shell on the beach.
translations.es: Encontramos un proyectil en la playa.
translations.de: Wir haben am Strand eine Granate gefunden.
translations.it: Abbiamo trovato un proiettile d'artiglieria sulla spiaggia.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在沙滩上发现了一枚炮弹。
translations.yue: 我哋喺沙灘搵到一枚炮彈。
translations.ru: Мы нашли на пляже артиллерийский снаряд.
translations.pt: Encontramos um projétil de artilharia na praia.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi tìm thấy một quả đạn pháo trên bãi biển.
translations.nl: We vonden een artilleriegranaat op het strand.
translations.uk: Ми знайшли на пляжі артилерійський снаряд.
translations.hu: Találtunk egy tüzérségi lövedéket a strandon.
translations.hi: हमें समुद्र तट पर एक तोप का गोला मिला.
translations.el: Βρήκαμε ένα βλήμα πυροβολικού στην παραλία.
translations.nb: Vi fant en artillerigranat på stranden.
translations.id: Kami menemukan sebuah peluru artileri di pantai.
translations.sv: Vi hittade en artillerigranat på stranden.
translations.ro: Am găsit un proiectil de artilerie pe plajă.
translations.cs: Na pláži jsme našli dělostřelecký granát.
translations.da: Vi fandt en artillerigranat på stranden.
translations.ja: 浜辺で砲弾を見つけました。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/personal subject pronoun (3rd person singular in form, often used for 'we' in speech).
Auxiliary verb (3rd person singular present) forming the passé composé with the past participle.
Past participle of the lexical verb; part of the compound past (passé composé) with 'avoir'.
Indefinite article, masculine singular, introducing a count noun.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'trouvé'.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, feminine singular, marking the following noun as definite.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'sur'.

sentences.target: Tu vois l'obus sur la photo.

translations.fr: Tu vois l'obus sur la photo.
translations.en: You see the shell in the photo.
translations.es: Ves el proyectil en la foto.
translations.de: Du siehst die Granate auf dem Foto.
translations.zh-Hans: 你在照片里能看到那枚炮弹。
translations.yue: 你喺張相入面見到嗰枚炮彈。
translations.pt: Você vê o projétil na foto.
translations.vi: Bạn thấy quả đạn pháo trong bức ảnh.
translations.nl: Je ziet de artilleriegranaat op de foto.
translations.hi: तुम तस्वीर में तोप का गोला देखते हो.
translations.id: Kamu melihat peluru artileri di foto.
translations.ja: 写真でその砲弾が見えるよ。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular subject pronoun.
Finite verb, present indicative (2nd person singular), transitive.
Noun preceded by elided definite article (le + obus → l'obus); direct object of 'vois'.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, feminine singular.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of 'sur'.

sentences.target: Les démineurs mettent l'obus en sécurité.

translations.fr: Les démineurs mettent l'obus en sécurité.
translations.en: The bomb squad is making the shell safe.
translations.es: Los artificieros están desactivando el proyectil.
translations.de: Der Kampfmittelräumdienst macht die Granate unschädlich.
translations.it: Gli artificieri stanno mettendo in sicurezza il proiettile.
translations.ko: 폭발물 처리반이 포탄을 안전하게 처리하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 排爆人员正在对炮弹进行安全处置。
translations.yue: 拆彈人員正將炮彈作出安全處理。
translations.pt: A equipe antibombas está desativando o projétil.
translations.tr: Bomba imha ekibi top mermisini etkisiz hale getiriyor.
translations.vi: Đội xử lý bom mìn đang vô hiệu hóa quả đạn pháo.
translations.nl: De explosievenopruimingsdienst maakt de artilleriegranaat onschadelijk.
translations.hi: बम निरोधक दस्ता तोप के गोले को निष्क्रिय कर रहा है.
translations.id: Tim penjinak bom sedang menonaktifkan peluru artileri itu.
translations.ja: 爆発物処理班が砲弾を無力化している。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, plural, marking the noun phrase as definite.
Common noun, masculine plural; subject of the verb.
Finite verb, present indicative (3rd person plural), transitive.
Noun with elided definite article (le + obus → l'obus); direct object of 'mettent'.
Preposition; here part of the fixed expression 'en sécurité' meaning 'to safety'.
Common noun, feminine singular; complement of the preposition 'en'.

sentences.target: Au musée, l'obus est dans une vitrine.
sentences.reading: /o myze lɔby ɛ dɑ̃z yn vitʁin/

translations.fr: Au musée, l'obus est dans une vitrine.
translations.ipa: /o myze lɔby ɛ dɑ̃z yn vitʁin/
translations.en: At the museum, the shell is in a display case.
translations.es: En el museo, el proyectil está en una vitrina.
translations.de: Im Museum ist die Granate in einer Vitrine.
translations.it: Al museo, il proiettile è in una teca.
translations.zh-Hans: 在博物馆里，炮弹放在展柜里。
translations.yue: 喺博物館入面，嗰枚炮彈喺展櫃入面。
translations.ru: В музее снаряд находится в витрине.
translations.pt: No museu, o projétil fica numa vitrine.
translations.vi: Trong bảo tàng, quả đạn pháo nằm trong tủ trưng bày.
translations.ar: في المتحف، القذيفة داخل خزانة عرض.
translations.nl: In het museum staat de artilleriegranaat in een vitrinekast.
translations.uk: У музеї снаряд знаходиться у вітрині.
translations.hu: A múzeumban a lövedék egy vitrinben van.
translations.hi: संग्रहालय में तोप का गोला एक प्रदर्शनी केस में है.
translations.pl: W muzeum pocisk znajduje się w gablocie.
translations.el: Στο μουσείο, το βλήμα βρίσκεται σε προθήκη.
translations.nb: På museet står artillerigranaten i en monter.
translations.id: Di museum, peluru artileri itu ada di dalam kotak pajangan.
translations.sv: På museet står artillerigranaten i en monter.
translations.ro: La muzeu, proiectilul este într-o vitrină.
translations.cs: V muzeu je dělостřelecký granát ve vitríně.
translations.da: På museet står artillerigranaten i en montre.
translations.ja: 博物館では砲弾が展示ケースに入っている。

tokens.explanation: Contraction of 'à + le'; preposition heading a locative phrase.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'au'.
Noun with elided definite article (le + obus → l'obus); grammatical subject.
Copular auxiliary (être), present indicative (3rd person singular), linking subject to a locative complement.
Preposition introducing a location.
Indefinite article, feminine singular.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'dans'.
